summary: Bootstrapped a dependency-free pnpm monorepo baseline with root workspace manifests, a Node 24 pin, and three hello-only workspace shells; no gameplay or domain systems were added.

tests_run.result: Scope: all 4 workspace projects; already up to date; generated the baseline lockfile.
Scope: all 4 workspace projects; already up to date; completed successfully with pnpm v11.0.0.
format:check, lint, typecheck, and test all passed across the 3 workspace packages.

decisions: Kept the baseline dependency-free and restricted it to hello-only shell packages so the monorepo shape is present without introducing gameplay or unnecessary production dependencies.
Used a shared workspace hello script to keep the package scripts deterministic and cross-platform.
risks: The workspace currently validates structure and command plumbing only; the real TypeScript/Vite/ESLint/Vitest stack remains for later foundation tasks.
requested_action: Review the monorepo/package boundaries, root and workspace scripts, lockfile integrity, and confirm the scope stays within the FOUNDATION-001 no-gameplay baseline.
